name: Ray's Transportation Svc
recent_news: No public news, M&A, or operator footprint found in web search; not listed in Missouri school bus contractor associations or NEMT broker networks (MTM Health) per available sources.
fit_notes: Tiny operator (~11 employees, ~$723K rev) with no verifiable school-bus footprint; phone (314) area suggests St. Louis NEMT/cab rather than yellow-bus contractor. Likely too small and off-thesis for Summit tuck-in unless it carries district SPED contracts that can be confirmed via direct outreach.

name: Together We Ride LLC
recent_news: No public news or web footprint located; not appearing in Missouri NEMT provider lists (MTM, Modivcare) or St. Louis County Special School District contractor materials per available sources.
fit_notes: Florissant MO LLC at residential-style address (325 Wren Dr) with ~11 employees; profile fits a one-/two-van NEMT or paratransit operator rather than a yellow-bus contractor. Low strategic value to Summit unless it holds Ferguson-Florissant/SSD SPED routes that can be verified in primary diligence.

name: Dca Transportation LLC
recent_news: Indiana Domestic LLC formed Jan 20, 2020 (Entity 202001201368762); Articles of Organization filed Jan 21, 2020; Business Entity Report filed Nov 3, 2021; entity status active. No school-district contracts or M&A activity surfaced.
fit_notes: Very small (~10 employees, ~$633K rev), founded only 2020, owner-operator at single Indianapolis address with NATO CAGE code 9D6G6 (suggests government/Medicaid contracting, not IPS yellow-bus). Likely NEMT/paratransit, not a tuck-in candidate for Summit's school-bus platform unless verified as IPS SPED contractor.

name: Oreus Transport LLC
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER (USDOT 3629292): intrastate-only, NOT authorized for-hire interstate; 1 power unit, 1 driver, 0 inspections/crashes in trailing 24 months. MCS-150 last updated 07/19/2021 reporting 100 miles in 2020. Creditsafe classifies it under Freight Transportation Arrangement.
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus / student-transport operator. Single-truck freight LLC at a residential Mount Wolf PA address, near-dormant (100 miles reported in 2020, no recent inspections). Hard exclude for Summit tuck-in pipeline.

name: Fern Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: likely NYC MTA Access-A-Ride or NYC OPT subcontract work (unconfirmed)
recent_news: Profiled on NYC's 'Shop Your City / BE NYC' Black-owned business directory as 'Fern Transportation Inc.' providing '1st class ADA compliant transport services for persons with disabilities and the elderly'; Andrea Harris's LinkedIn lists her as 'CEO Fern Transportation Inc. Paratransit'. No M&A activity located.
fit_notes: Small (~10 employees, ~$627K rev) Black-/woman-owned paratransit & ADA transport operator in Queens (Cambria Heights). Off-thesis vs. yellow-bus tuck-in but could be relevant if Summit is rolling up NYC OPT-adjacent ambulette/SPED carriers; size is sub-scale for a meaningful tuck-in on its own.
